name_cn:
『Burberry』
【B 】Small "Title - Teller Handbag", crafted from selected vintage check scraps, featuring smooth leather trim and three rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or transformed into a shoulder bag with a detachable strap. Style No. 8347
Size: 26 x 13.5 x 20cm
